entry.title: Fighting to come home to you
entry.summary:
Author: delusional911_buddie

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,834Chapters: 1/10Kudos: 0

Summary: Buck, Eddie, Chris, and Theo have created a little family dynamic together, but then it all changes when something unexpected happens, causing Buck and Eddie’s relationship to change forever, and Buck's relationship with his sons to deepen.

entry.title: Volcanic Eruptions
entry.summary:
Author: budding

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,721Chapters: 9/9Kudos: 1

entry.title: If One Day You Wake Up
entry.summary:
Author: email_eddie

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 49,304Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 320

Summary: Eddie has finally relaxed, finally convinced himself that this is all just a funny coincidence, when the man looks up and locks eyes with Eddie.No.Fuck.No, no, no.This cannot be happening. === At 14 years old, Eddie Diaz's best friend loses his memories. Forgets all about him and moves away. Eddie's fine. He's moved on with his life. He's made peace with losing Evan Buckley.Until he starts his new job as an LAFD firefighter and comes face to face with everything he's been repressing for 13 years.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,982Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 41

entry.title: another hole to dig my soul in
entry.summary:
Author: veil_nebula

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,046Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: How is Buck here?“Eddie,” he says again, and it is his voice.It’s his intonation, it’s his timbre, it’s the same way Eddie’s heard his name come from this mouth hundreds, thousands of times. The sound of it is a salve to his injuries, and it pulls a sob from deep within his chest.His relief is short-lived, soon swept away by heartrending clarity, because he can’t be hearing this voice. He can’t be hearing it because Buck can’t be here. Buck is somewhere in the building, a few floors away from Eddie, who’s still suspended mid-air in an echoing shaft, stuck in-between.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: Now I'm happy (Guess you can't be)
entry.summary:
Author: moodlight

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,140Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 60

Summary: Buck thought the breakup with Tommy had ended cleanly. No screaming, no betrayal — just the quiet realization that Buck was in love with Eddie. But Tommy keeps showing up everywhere Buck and Eddie go, lingering in the background and reaching out long after they’ve both supposedly moved on. What starts as awkward run-ins quickly turns bitter, as Tommy struggles to accept that Buck is finally happy — and that happiness doesn’t include him anymore. -- Inspired by a song by Only The Poets called You Hate That I'm In Love

entry.title: corpus delicti
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 33,343Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 453

Summary: "So." Buck takes another sip of coffee, real slow, savoring the wind-up. He sets the mug down with a soft clink. "Princess." Eddie closes his eyes. This is it. This is where they find him face down in his eggs. Chimney's going to have to call Pepa. Pepa is going to be furious. The funeral will be small and Buck better wear something hideous to it, Buck better wear that godawful floral shirt with the parrots, the one Eddie told him was ugly out loud one time two years ago and has been secretly obsessed with ever since, because Eddie deserves the satisfaction of being buried while looking at it. "Buck." He says it into his toast. Buck shrugs. "I'm just asking." "You're not asking. You're enjoying yourself." "I'm doing both, Eds, I’m versatile." Or,Eddie gains a boyfriend, a pair of lace panties, and learns a lot about himself in the span of forty-eight hours.

entry.title: You Are Not Alone, Believe Me
entry.summary:
Author: afternooncupoftea

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,367Chapters: 9/?Kudos: 207

Summary: “Okay, um, what else? Obviously, there’s more information because you wouldn’t be telling me this. Can you please just—” The lawyer nods. “Daniela had two daughters, twins, born May 10th 2015. Alena and Adela Buckley.”“I—you—what? You’re saying that I have two daughters?”OrBuck gets the unexpected news that he’s a father to two twin girls and the lawyer may or may not think that Buck and Eddie are in a relationship.

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 916,381Chapters: 92/?Kudos: 129

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 673,702Chapters: 85/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: S6 Superwoman: Last Responder
entry.summary:
Author: That_bitch_without_a_life

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,166Chapters: 13/13Kudos: 37

Summary: For the past few months everything has been hectic and a little off balance. For some reason Bobby keeps putting her in different shift groups. It’s nice to be working with Ravi again now that he’s finished his probation and moved back to B-shift, but something is clearly up. With the return of the rest of the 118 things are starting to look up for Kara, but more importantly, new opportunity. TLDR: this is a female buck fic if she was supergirl, just trust the process.

entry.title: How to fall out of love with your best friend - a comprehensive guide by Evan Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: PrincessRclaw16

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,890Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 28

Summary: When Buck realizes that he is in love with Eddie, he does what Buck does best: make a list of steps on how to fall out of love with his best friend. And if Eddie could just cooperate and stop being so amazing and perfect all the time, it would really make Buck's life a lot easier, thank you very much. Companion piece to "How to make your best friend fall in love with you - a comprehensive guide by Eddie Diaz"

entry.summary:
Author: PrincessRclaw16

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,042Chapters: 2/11Kudos: 42

Summary: When Eddie realized that he was in love with Buck, he took a page from Buck's book of tricks and made a list on how to get his best friend to fall in love with him. Now, if Buck would stop being so difficult and cooperate so that they could get to the 'happy ever after' part of their story, Eddie would greatly appreciate it.

entry.title: The Heliophilic Condition
entry.summary:
Author: 2beeautifuul

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,984Chapters: 1/17Kudos: 3

Summary: The odds might actually be in Buck’s favor. It’s all Eddie can hope for. When it comes down to it, Eddie could live a thousand lifetimes and never deserve the love Buck’s given him. In the arena, he’ll fight to keep Buck alive. Because Buck is the best of them. To win the Games is for Buck to survive.  or, Eddie Diaz, Victor of the 69th Hunger Games, prepares for another year of the Games. Little does he know that the Quarter Quell will have devastating consequences. or, the 118 is thrown into the Hunger Games

entry.title: You're In Love (A Buddie oneshot Collection)
entry.summary:
Author: Jonasdirection101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 163,862Chapters: 36/?Kudos: 17

Summary: "You can hear it in the silence. You can feel it on the way home. You can see it with the lights out. You are in love, true love. You are in love." - Taylor Swift (1989)

entry.title: man enough
entry.summary:
Author: coreliot

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,288Chapters: 4/30Kudos: 24

Summary: The world hits Eddie Diaz with sharp jabs; punches to the gut, chest, face.And he’s caught, trapped, between the blows—that are fast and hard like snipers to his left, like Greggs with a bullet in his chest, like Shannon bloody on the ground—and relief.Relief that comes quick and far between, like Christopher in his arms, like the 118 by his side, like a cold beer in his kitchen, just him and Buck.He’s always alternating between the two, never not ready for the blow, never not waiting for relief to end.That’s all he’s known, all he’s ever known.OrEddie’s been the man of the house since he turned 11 years old.–Title from “Placing the Blame” by Self.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: i'll have everything i'll ever need (i'm carryin' your love with me)
entry.summary:
Author: alwaysou28

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,227Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 60

Summary: “Baby, I love you so fucking much,” Eddie started. “You are the love of my life, and I will do anything to make you happy, but if we have to drive another hour to another venue, we’re not getting married anymore.” “It’s only been four venues,” Buck raised his eyebrows, glancing over at him. It had been a long day and they had toured multiple venues — some botanical gardens, the zoo, and a banquet hall, and Buck hadn’t really liked any of them. “We’ve only got a couple more, and then we’re done, I promise.” OR Buck and Eddie start wedding planning; Chris turns 16.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: With Arms Wide Open (Everything Has Changed)
entry.summary:
Author: funnyfeelingbuckley

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,360Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 230

Summary: Theo sighs dramatically and with full gusto, all the fight leaving him as he stares up at the ceiling. “But I don't want to go to bed,” he whines quietly. “I know,” Eddie says empathetically, “Going to bed is Buck’s least favorite part of the day, too. But, hey,” he continues, “The more sleep you get, the more energy you have for adventures tomorrow. Isn’t that right, Buck?” “That’s right,” Buck says, “and Eddie told me that he was going to take you to see the Hollywood sign tomorrow.” Eddie had not told Buck that he was going to take Theo to see the Hollywood sign. Buck’s face appears on the screen, wearing a knowing grin, and Eddie realizes, with a fond sort of inevitability, that they’ll be going to the Hollywood sign tomorrow.   - Or, Eddie and Theo get their own version of the tsunami episode.  title based on the song With Arms Wide Open by Creed

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)

entry.title: What still might happen
entry.summary:
Author: amisguidedpoet

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,516Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 16

Summary: Buck was the closest thing to art Eddie had seen in years. Of course, Eddie didn’t know that at the time. Back then, Buck was just a stranger with golden hair in an empty gallery, talking about a photograph Eddie knew very well. But looking back now, after everything that happened, after everything Buck became, Eddie could see it clearly: Buck was color. And Eddie hadn’t seen much color in a long time. --- Eddie hasn’t painted since his wife died. Life’s been quieter since. Until he meets Buck, a student who seems to notice everything Eddie’s spent years trying not to. It doesn’t feel like anything at first. But then it does, and suddenly, he’s not sure he knows how to ignore it anymore.
